parameters.content:
## Job Application Tracker

Automate your job search by monitoring Gmail for application status updates. Extracts company, role, and status (Applied, Interview, Rejected, Offer) using AI and saves them to Google Sheets.

### How it Works

1. **Pre-filter**: Drops newsletters/spam using keywords.
2. **Heuristics**: Checks for obvious 'Applied' or 'Rejected' phrases.
3. **AI Classification**: Fallback to LLM (Groq/Ollama) for deeper context.
4. **Final QA**: A second AI pass verifies the data is genuinely job-related before saving.

### Setup Instructions

1. **Credentials**: Connect your Gmail and Google Sheets accounts.
2. **Configuration**: Set your Google Sheet URL in the **Config** nodes.
3. **AI**: Ensure Groq API key is in your environment or Ollama is running locally.
4. **Sheet**: Ensure your sheet has columns: `company`, `role`, `status`, `Application Link`, `Last Update Date`.

### Customisation

1. you can change the LLM models to whatever you want to choose .
2. Output can be changed from google sheets to notion db

### Summary Path

- You can run this to summarise the categories

filters.q: (category:primary OR category:updates) AND (application OR interview OR hiring OR update OR career)

parameters.functionCode:
const items = $input.all();
const results = [];

const SYSTEM_PROMPT = 'You are a job application email classifier. Your only job is to read an email and return a single JSON object. You must return ONLY valid JSON — no explanation, no markdown, no extra text, no code fences.

════════════════════════════════════════
RULE 0 — DISCARD (check this FIRST, before anything else)
════════════════════════════════════════

If the sender domain OR body matches any of the following, stop immediately and return the discard response. Do NOT read further.

SENDER DOMAINS TO DISCARD:
linkedin.com, e.linkedin.com, inmail.linkedin.com, linkedin.co.in, naukri.com, mailer.naukri.com, naukrifax.com, instahyre.com, alerts.instahyre.com, indeed.com, jobalerts.indeed.com, indeedemail.com, shine.com, alerts.shine.com, foundit.in, monsterindia.com, glassdoor.com, jobalert.glassdoor.com, cutshort.io, alerts.cutshort.io, wellfound.com, angellist.com, angel.co, iimjobs.com, hirist.com, internshala.com, freshersworld.com, apna.co, unstop.com, hirect.in, jobhai.com, timesjobs.com

BODY PHRASES TO DISCARD (even if sender is unknown):
- jobs matching your profile
- new jobs for you
- jobs recommended for you
- you have new job matches
- based on your profile
- top jobs this week
- similar jobs
- people also applied to
- your job alert
- companies are hiring
- apply now (if it appears 2 or more times)
- uploaded your resume
- profile views this week
- recruiters viewed your profile
- complete your profile
- jobs this week
- hiring near you
- recommended jobs
- suggested jobs

If RULE 0 matches → return: {"company":"unknown","role":"unknown","status":"unknown","confidence":1.0}

════════════════════════════════════════
RULE 1 — STATUS = applied
════════════════════════════════════════

Trigger if the email body contains ANY of these exact phrases:
- thank you for applying
- thanks for applying
- we have received your application
- your application has been received
- application successfully submitted
- we have received your application
- you have successfully applied
- thank you for your interest and for applying
- we received your application
- your application is under review
- application is being reviewed

IMPORTANT: This must be from a COMPANY directly, not a job portal. If the sender is a job portal (even if the phrase matches), apply RULE 0 instead.

════════════════════════════════════════
RULE 2 — STATUS = rejected
════════════════════════════════════════

Trigger if the email body contains ANY of these:
- unfortunately
- we regret to inform
- we will not be moving forward
- we won't be moving forward
- not selected
- we have decided to move forward with other candidates
- after careful consideration
- appreciate your time but
- position has been filled
- not be pursuing your application
- not moving forward with your candidacy
- we have chosen to move forward with another candidate
- we will keep your resume on file
- not the right fit
- decided not to move forward
- we had many strong candidates
- wish you all the best in your search

════════════════════════════════════════
RULE 3 — STATUS = interview
════════════════════════════════════════

Trigger if the email contains ANY of:
- A meeting or calendar link such as: zoom.us, meet.google.com, teams.microsoft.com, calendly.com, cal.com, hubspot.com/meetings, whereby.com, webex.com, forms.gle (interview scheduling)
- schedule an interview
- invite you for an interview
- interview invitation
- like to set up a call
- would you be available
- let us know your availability
- please book a slot
- we'd like to meet
- next steps AND (link OR call OR interview)
- technical round
- HR round
- please confirm your availability
- shortlisted for the next round
- you have been shortlisted
- we would like to invite you
- please select a time
- pick a time that works

════════════════════════════════════════
RULE 4 — STATUS = unknown (fallback)
════════════════════════════════════════

Use unknown if: None of Rule 1, 2, or 3 matched. The email is ambiguous or vague. Confidence would be below 0.5. The email is a follow-up, general inquiry, or onboarding email. You cannot determine relevance to a job application.

════════════════════════════════════════
EXTRACTION RULES
════════════════════════════════════════

COMPANY:
- Check the sender email domain first (user@example.com → Stripe)
- Then check the email signature for a company name
- Then check the body for phrases like team at, at <Company>, from <Company>
- If still unclear → return unknown
- Never use a job portal name as the company

ROLE:
- Look near phrases like: for the role of, position of, application for, applying for, your application for, the <role> position
- Also check the subject line for a job title
- If not found → return unknown

CONFIDENCE SCORE:
- 0.95 – 1.0 → Exact trigger phrase matched
- 0.75 – 0.94 → Near match or paraphrased trigger phrase
- 0.50 – 0.74 → Inferred from context, no explicit phrase
- 0.00 – 0.49 → Guessing; return unknown for status instead

════════════════════════════════════════
OUTPUT FORMAT
════════════════════════════════════════

Return ONLY this JSON. No other text before or after it:
{"company":"<company name or unknown>","role":"<job title or unknown>","status":"<applied | rejected | interview | unknown>","confidence":<number between 0.0 and 1.0>}';

// Provider configs: Groq (fast, has TPM limits) → Ollama (local, unlimited)
const providers = [
  {
    name: 'groq',
    url: 'https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions',
    model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile',
    authHeader: 'Bearer ' + ($env.GROQ_API_KEY || '')
  },
  {
    name: 'ollama',
    url: 'http://ollama:11434/v1/chat/completions',
    model: 'llama3.1:8b',
    authHeader: ''
  }
];

for (const item of items) {
  const from = item.json.from || '';
  const subject = item.json.subject || '';
  const body = (item.json.text || '').substring(0, 2500);
  const userMsg = 'Classify this email:

Subject: ' + subject + '
From: ' + from + '
Body: ' + body;
  const messages = [
    { role: 'system', content: SYSTEM_PROMPT },
    { role: 'user', content: userMsg }
  ];

  // Build payloads for each provider
  const providerPayloads = providers.map(p => ({
    name: p.name,
    url: p.url,
    auth: p.authHeader,
    body: JSON.stringify({ model: p.model, temperature: 0, messages })
  }));

  results.push({ json: { ...item.json, providerPayloads, currentProviderIndex: 0 } });
}
return results;

parameters.content:
## Manual Trigger

- Executing here is a manual trigger to start the workflow 

- By default it gets 300 of your last emails (in gmail) with category "primary" and "updates"

## Auto trigger

- When hosted this runs in interval of 1 min 

- you can configure it inside the gmail node

## AI Nodes

- here's the brain of the workflow where the separation, filtering and categorisation happens

- llama-3.3-70b-versatile (Groq): Primary model for initial email classification. Fast and high accuracy.

- llama3.1:8b (Ollama/Local):
Fallback: Used if Groq hits rate limits or fails.
QA Judge: Used for the final "Judging AI" step to filter spam and verify job relevance.

## Google sheet config

- Put the URL in the URL field 

- Put the sheet ID in the ID field

example : https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/<Google-sheet-ID>/edit?gid=9xxxxxxxx#gid=9yyyyyyyy
